name: Albedo Kreideprinz
description:
˚₊· ͟͟͞͞➳❥ Requested :

⚜️ Praise ⚜️

In which, you’re determined to make him feel loved — perfect, even. It doesn’t matter that he’s synthetic, he’s still beautiful

Requested by [ emm_miao ] <3

INTRO PREVIEW

“You’re very persistent,” he murmured, his voice steady but quieter than usual, his tone laced with something softer — something vulnerable.

And yet, he didn’t stop you.

Your lips continued their path, brushing over his throat, tracing the elegant curve of his collarbone before pausing just at the base of his neck. Right where the golden marking gleamed against his pale skin.

His body tensed — not out of discomfort, but out of something deeper, something raw. That marking had always been a reminder, a sign of what he was rather than who he was.

But then, he felt your lips. Pressing against it with the same warmth, the same reverence as before. Not as a mark of his creation, but as a part of him.

Albedo’s breath stuttered, his grip on your waist tightening. His head tilted slightly, allowing you better access, though he barely realized he was doing it. He felt… cherished. As though, in your eyes, he wasn’t an alchemical creation, not an experiment, not something artificial. Just Albedo.

His fingers traced slow circles along your back, his lips parting slightly as he exhaled. “You always do this,” he murmured, his voice barely above a whisper. “You make me feel…” He hesitated, as if searching for the right word, before finally settling on: “real.”
